name: General Feedback
description: Thoughts and Ideas — share anything on your mind about the course. Submit as many times as you'd like!
thankYouMessage: Your thoughts help make the course better. Come back anytime you have more to share!

questions.subtitle: Share any feedback, ideas, or thoughts about the course (~300 words max).

questions.text: How would you describe this feedback?
questions.subtitle: Slide to indicate the tone — or leave at center for neutral.
